reviews.review_msg: As highlighted by others, Dr. Jones' marking is unreasonably picky/unclear. She also takes an unreasonable amount of time to provide us with feedback and grades. Dr. Jones often came off defensively and was frequently late to lecture. Unlike other profs, she has one office hr per week and will not reschedule if this time does not work for students.

This is not a writing course, yet 45% of the mark is devoted to writing. Weekly assignments and three 10% assignments for which the instructions must be followed to a T (any formatting/grammatical error decreases one's mark). The material is interesting but she is boring - she uses up the entire 3 hours for material that can be covered in 1 hour.

Ridiculous amount of homework (thought papers and assignments). Style of marking is unclear and unreasonably picky. Feedbacks about your writing are not helpful and accurate at all. Professor is interesting and engaging, and the class is fun, but you are required to memorize a lot. A lot of materials to study. But honestly, don't take it with her.
Terrible, extremely ssllooowww lectures, vague slides, unclear description of the ASSIGNMENTS. take it with someone else
This is the WORST professor ever. The lectures are painful and extremely b..o..r..i..n..g!

There were a lot of writing for this course, but they were not difficult. The lectures do tend to be long and boring, but the studies that she talks about are very interesting. Exams were fair. Would definitely take another class with her.

For a 200 level course, I thought it was a lot of work. The assignments are so broad that it almost becomes difficult. Anyways, if you are a strong writer, you should take the course with her. And attending lectures gets extra marks!

She seems really nice but extremely boring. She'd draw out lectures for the full 3hrs although content shouldn't have taken that long. She's changed her syllabus so it's harder to do well. Too many assignments, unfair marking (mark down for grammar/syntax) - Treated the course like a W course. Focused on studies far too much. Wouldn't recommend.

Janelle is a really nice person but super boring. Her lectures were a waste of my 3 hours every week. She focuses too much on studies rather than application. Assignments are really easy and a great way to boost your mark. Midterm and final were fair. You just need to know your stuff. Wouldn't take another course with her though.

Assignments were very easy, basically guaranteed marks and took very little time to do. Uses lots of research examples, which can be daunting, but are still interesting. Not the easiest class, but it was worth taking.
